meaning: n.腮须,胡须,扫拂者vt.使有须,使有须状物
examples: Tactfully, Whisker gave Kate suggestions on how best to mix and match the clothes she already owned while also suggesting new additions.
They came within a whisker of being killed.
Since then Ms. Whisker has been a regular visitor to Kate's London apartment.
Ms. PEREZ: Well, it was - first of all, it was by a whisker.
And nobody forgets that the French approved the Maastricht treaty by only a bee's whisker.
